thought.text: Baseline 1.37. Now let me see the rtlib and understand how `getint`/etc are called:

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && cat test/rtlib/*.cpp test/rtlib/*.c 2>/dev/null | head -50 ; ls test/rtlib/
